Name: MAP_OBJECT_GD_PARAM
Description: Defines animation, VFX/SFX behavior, emissive effects, and breakable object presentation settings for map objects.

Fields.Name: Animation ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the animation used by this map object.

Fields.Name: Initial Frame Start
Fields.Description: Starting frame of the initial animation range.

Fields.Name: Initial Frame End
Fields.Description: Ending frame of the initial animation range.

Fields.Name: Loop Animation
Fields.Description: Determines whether the animation should loop continuously.

Fields.Name: Is Breakable
Fields.Description: Determines whether this object can be destroyed.

Fields.Name: Is Prefab
Fields.Description: Indicates whether this object is a prefab instance.

Fields.Name: Camera Collision Behavior
Fields.Description: Defines behavior when the camera collides or intersects with the object.

Fields.Name: Emissive Scale 0
Fields.Description: Intensity multiplier for the first emissive lighting effect.

Fields.Name: Emissive Scale 1
Fields.Description: Intensity multiplier for the second emissive lighting effect.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 0
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 0.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 1
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 1.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 2
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 2.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 3
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 3.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 4
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 4.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 5
Fields.Description: Effect identifier for effect slot 5.

Fields.Name: Break SFX ID 0
Fields.Description: Effect played when the object is broken (slot 0).

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 0
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 0.

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 1
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 1.

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 2
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 2.

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 3
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 3.

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 4
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 4.

Fields.Name: SFX Spawn Point 5
Fields.Description: Attachment point for spawning effect 5.

Fields.Name: Break SFX Spawn Point 0
Fields.Description: Attachment point for break effect 0.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 0
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 0.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 1
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 1.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 2
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 2.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 3
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 3.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 4
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 4.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID 5
Fields.Description: Identifier for dummy polygon used as SFX emission source 5.

Fields.Name: Break Dummy Poly ID 0
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon identifier used for break SFX emission.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 0
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 1
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 2
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 3
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 4
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 4.

Fields.Name: Follows Object 5
Fields.Description: Determines whether SFX or effects follow the object for slot 5.
